enonce.texte:
Read the text below carefully and answer the questions that follow.

Modern technology has changed the way we live, work, and communicate. Inventions like the World Wide Web (WWW), MP3 players, and USB flash drives have made our lives easier. The WWW allows us to access information from anywhere in the world. MP3 players let us carry thousands of songs in our pockets. USB drives help us store and transfer data quickly.

Communication has also been revolutionized by applications like WhatsApp and Viber. These apps allow us to send messages, make voice calls, and share photos and videos with friends and family. They are popular because they are easy to use and often free.

However, using these technologies also has challenges. Some people worry about privacy and security. Others find it difficult to keep up with new technologies. It is important to learn how to use these inventions safely and responsibly.

questions.texte: List three modern inventions mentioned in the text.
questions.reponse: The World Wide Web (WWW), MP3 players, and USB flash drives. (WhatsApp and Viber can also be accepted as they are mentioned later.)

questions.texte: According to the text, what are two advantages of using WhatsApp and Viber?
questions.reponse: They allow us to send messages, make voice calls, and share photos and videos. They are also easy to use and often free.

questions.texte: Explain the main idea of the last paragraph.
questions.reponse: The last paragraph explains that although modern technologies are useful, they also have challenges like privacy and security concerns, and it is important to use them safely and responsibly.

questions.texte: Analyze why the WWW is considered a major invention. Justify your answer using information from the text.
questions.reponse: The WWW is considered a major invention because it allows us to access information from anywhere in the world. This has revolutionized the way we access knowledge, making it easier and faster to get information on any subject.

enonce.texte:
Complete the sentences using the correct words from the box.

Word Box: invention, technology, device, application, store, transfer, share, access, revolution, challenge

questions.texte: The smartphone is a modern ________ that helps us do many things.
questions.reponse: device

questions.texte: WhatsApp is a popular ________ for sending messages.
questions.reponse: application

questions.texte: You can ________ your photos and videos with your friends on social media.
questions.reponse: share

questions.texte: USB drives allow us to ________ and ________ data from one computer to another.
questions.reponse: store, transfer

questions.texte: The Internet is a great ________ that has changed the world.
questions.reponse: invention

questions.texte: One of the main ________ of using new technologies is protecting our privacy.
questions.reponse: challenges

enonce.texte:
Identify the word that has a different sound in each group.

Focus on the underlined sounds.

questions.texte: Group 1: WWW (double-u) / Viber / share / data
questions.reponse: WWW - the sound /dʌbəljuː/ has a different initial sound from the others which start with consonant sounds.

questions.texte: Group 2: chat / challenge / machine / change
questions.reponse: machine - it has the /ʃ/ sound while the others have the /tʃ/ sound.

questions.texte: Group 3: MP3 / USB / WhatsApp / WWW
questions.reponse: WhatsApp - it is pronounced with a /w/ sound while the others are pronounced as acronyms or initialisms.

questions.texte: Group 4: technology / invention / information / application
questions.reponse: technology - it has the /n/ sound while the others have the /ʃ/ sound at the end.

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct form of the verb in brackets.

questions.texte: The first mobile phone ________ (invent) in 1973.
questions.reponse: was invented

questions.texte: Nowadays, people ________ (use) smartphones for many purposes.
questions.reponse: use

questions.texte: I ________ (download) this application yesterday.
questions.reponse: downloaded

questions.texte: Many apps ________ (download) by users every day.
questions.reponse: are downloaded

questions.texte: The company ________ (develop) a new software next year.
questions.reponse: will develop

questions.texte: The information ________ (already / send) to all the users.
questions.reponse: has already been sent

enonce.texte:
Complete the dialogue between two friends about modern inventions. Use the words from the box.

Word Box: WhatsApp, USB, MP3, WWW, Viber, store, share, transfer, access, device

questions.texte:
Paul: Have you heard about the new modern inventions?
Marie: Yes, I have! I use ________ every day to talk to my family abroad.
Paul: That's great! I prefer ________ because I find it easier to use.
Marie: I also like using ________ players to listen to music.
Paul: Me too! And I use a ________ drive to ________ my documents.
Marie: That's useful. The ________ has changed how we ________ information.
Paul: Absolutely! We can ________ photos and ________ data quickly.
Marie: Technology is truly a wonderful ________.
questions.reponse: WhatsApp, Viber, MP3, USB, store, WWW, access, share, transfer, device

enonce.texte:
Choose one of the following topics and write a short descriptive paragraph (8-12 lines).

  • Topic A: Describe how you use the Internet (WWW) in your daily life.
  • Topic B: Explain the advantages and disadvantages of using social media applications like WhatsApp or Viber.
  • Topic C: Describe a modern invention that has changed your life and explain why it is important to you.

Criteria: Content (2 pts), Grammar and Vocabulary (2 pts), Organization (1 pt).

questions.texte: Write your paragraph here:
questions.reponse:
Sample Answer (Topic A):

The Internet has become an essential part of my daily life. I use it to search for information for my school projects. The WWW helps me find articles, videos, and images that help me understand my lessons better. I also use the Internet to communicate with my friends and family through social media and email. Sometimes, I watch movies and listen to music online. However, I have to be careful because there is a lot of false information on the Internet. I always check the sources before using any information. The Internet is a wonderful tool that makes my life easier and more connected.

intitule: Analyzing a Brochure on Modern Inventions

enonce.texte:
Read the following description of a brochure about modern inventions and answer the questions.

BROCHURE: "CONNECTED WORLD"

This brochure presents five key inventions that have transformed our world:

  • World Wide Web (WWW): Access information from anywhere.
  • MP3: Carry thousands of songs in your pocket.
  • USB: Transfer data between devices easily.
  • WhatsApp: Send messages and make calls for free.
  • Viber: Connect with people around the world.

The brochure concludes with a message: "Technology connects us. Use it wisely!"

questions.texte: What is the main purpose of this brochure?
questions.reponse: The main purpose is to present five key inventions that have transformed our world and to encourage people to use technology wisely.

questions.texte: Analyze the message "Technology connects us. Use it wisely!" What do you think the creator of the brochure means by this?
questions.reponse: The creator means that technology allows people to communicate and stay connected with each other. However, it is important to use technology responsibly and safely, being aware of its potential negative effects like privacy issues or addiction.

questions.texte: Evaluate the brochure's presentation. Why do you think the creator chose these five inventions to highlight?
questions.reponse: The creator chose these five inventions because they are some of the most widely used and impactful technologies. The WWW revolutionized information access, MP3 changed how we consume music, USB made data transfer easy, and WhatsApp and Viber transformed communication. They represent key areas of modern life: information, entertainment, data management, and communication.

enonce.texte:
You are a journalist for the school newspaper. You want to interview a classmate about their use of modern inventions. Write five questions you would ask them.

Remember to use question words like: what, when, how, why, which.

questions.texte: Write your questions here:
questions.reponse:
Sample Questions:

  1. What modern inventions do you use most often?
  2. How do you use the Internet in your daily life?
  3. Which communication app do you prefer, WhatsApp or Viber, and why?
  4. When did you start using your first smartphone?
  5. Why do you think modern technology is important for students?

enonce.texte: Transform the following sentences from active to passive voice.

questions.texte: People use WhatsApp to send messages.
questions.reponse: WhatsApp is used (by people) to send messages.

questions.texte: The company developed a new application.
questions.reponse: A new application was developed (by the company).

questions.texte: Students share information on the Internet.
questions.reponse: Information is shared (by students) on the Internet.

questions.texte: Scientists will invent new technologies in the future.
questions.reponse: New technologies will be invented (by scientists) in the future.

enonce.texte: Match each acronym with its full form.

questions.texte: WWW
questions.reponse: World Wide Web

questions.texte: USB
questions.reponse: Universal Serial Bus

questions.texte: MP3
questions.reponse: MPEG-1 Audio Layer 3

questions.texte: ICT
questions.reponse: Information and Communication Technology

questions.texte: WWW
questions.reponse: World Wide Web
